accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text or are accurate context (EPCA, Section 366, DOE administration are verified).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; identifying the Secretary as Secretary of Energy and EPCA as the amended statute is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose of requiring states to address local distribution system security in energy security plans.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly states the bill amends Section 366 of the Energy Policy and Conservation Act and describes specific changes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the eligibility condition tied to plan submission and the clarification that submission need not be approved by the Secretary.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the September 30, 2031 sunset and the September 30, 2030 GAO report deadline.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures all essential operative provisions: definitions, plan contents, may-to-shall change, sunset, and GAO report.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive tone with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across the provisions described.

concise.why: Efficient summary without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the EPCA, Comptroller General, and Secretary of Energy as the relevant entities.

correct_figures.why: The 100 kilovolt threshold, September 30, 2031 sunset, and September 30, 2030 report date all match the bill.
